tr.td: 1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (400 mg) every 6 to 8 hours as needed
Metformin hydrochloride 500 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
Acetaminophen 300 mg and hydrocodone bitartrate 5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (300 mg/5 mg) every 4 to 6 hours as needed
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Hepatitis A virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Assessment of health and social care needs

ul.li: Achieve LDL cholesterol less than 100 mg/dL
Achieve total cholesterol less than 200 mg/dL
Achieve HDL cholesterol greater than 40 mg/dL
Maintain HbA1c at or below 7.0% to optimize glycemic control.
Maintain fasting blood glucose between 80 and 130 mg/dL.
Check and record blood glucose at least once daily as part of diabetes self-management.

tr.td: Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Aspartate aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
